title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 347.097 - Interest may issue upon consideration
text:
347.097.  Interest may issue upon consideration. — An interest in a limited liability company may be issued for the consideration of a contribution or an enforceable promise to make a contribution in the future, or both.
(L. 1993 S.B. 66 & 20 § 359.754) 
Effective 12-01-93
